prompt: A stunningly beautiful young Asian woman with a K-pop idol aesthetic, featuring a soft V-shaped face and pale porcelain skin. She has long, platinum white hair with airy see-through bangs and loose, wind-blown strands creating a natural messy look. Her eyes are large, crystal blue (resembling contact lenses), looking directly at the viewer with a pure and innocent expression. She is wearing a tight-fitting grey ribbed knit camisole that highlights her figure, paired with a matching grey skater skirt. The background is a soft, out-of-focus park scene with creamy bokeh. The lighting is diffused and airy, creating a dreamy, soft-focus photorealistic portrait, 8k resolution, detailed texture.
